verses.text: Ka khuadak kik leh huihlakah a leeng laizial khat ka mu hi
Vantung mi in, “Bang na mu hiam?” ci-in hong dong a, kei zong, “Laizial a leeng khat ka mu a, a dung pi sawmthum pha-in, a vai pi sawm leh pi nga pha hi,” ci-in ka dawng hi

Tua ciangin amah in kei kiangah, “Leitung gam khempeuhah a tung ding hamsiatnate, hih lai tungah kigelh hi. Guta khempeuh, gamsung panin kisiakmang ding hi, ci-in laizial dal lang khatah kigelh a, a manlopi-in ka min tawh thuciam mi khempeuh zong kisiakkhia mang ding hi, ci-in a lang khatah kigelh hi

Vanglian Topa in hih samsiatna a khahkhiatna ding thu gen a, guta mite khempeuh leh a manloin ka min tawh thuciam mite khempeuh' innsungah lut ding hi. Tua bang mite' innsungah a tawntungin hamsiatna omin, amaute-a kipan a sing a suang, a vekpi-in sumai ding hi,” hong ci hi.
Tua ciangin vantung mi hong kilang kikin kei kiangah, “Tu-a a hong pai ding en in,” hong ci hi
Kei zong, “Bang ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi. Amah in hong dawng a, “Tua pen ciangpi hi a, gamsung khempeuh' mawhna lim ahi hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangpi sin pen haknaw tawh a kibawl ahi hi. Tua bangin ka et laitakin haknaw kibawl tua ciangpi sin pen kidomto a, tua ciangpi sungah numei khat a tu hi
Tua ciangin vantung mi in, “Hih numei pen gitlohna lim ahi hi,” hong ci hi. Tua ciangin vantung mi in ciangpi sungah tua numei hensuk kik a, a sin tawh tua ciangpi a sinkik hi
Tua ciangin ka khuadak leh numei nih ka mu a, gun vapi bangin kha nei-in, keima lamah hong leeng uh hi. Van lamah tua ciangpi a leen'pihto uh hi
Tua ciangin vantung mi kiangah, “Koi lai-ah leen'pih ding ahi uh hiam?” ci-in ka dot leh
amah in, “Biakinn khat a lamsak dingin Babylon gamah a leen'pih ding ahi uh hi. Biakinn a lamsak uh a zawh uh ciangin, biak dingin tua ciangpi kikoih ding hi,” ci-in a hong dawng hi.
